name: mfc-pp-dd-branch
description: Membership Fee Contribution For Prosperity Party Dire Dawa Branch Office - Full Stack App

scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && cp frontend/public/manifest.json frontend/dist/manifest.json && cp frontend/public/service-worker.js frontend/dist/service-worker.js && cp -r frontend/public/icons frontend/dist/icons && npm install --prefix backend
